languages.text: "Надеюсь, {name}, ты не откажешь себе в возможности насладиться этим "нектаром". Судя по тому, что я слышал о вашем быте, питаться переработкой из себе подобных вам не привыкать".

traits.locale_text: "Надеюсь, {name}, ты не откажешь себе в возможности насладиться этим "нектаром". Судя по тому, что я слышал о вашем быте, питаться переработкой из себе подобных вам не привыкать".
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."
languages.original_text: "Надеюсь, {name}, ты не откажешь себе в возможности насладиться этим "нектаром". Судя по тому, что я слышал о вашем быте, питаться переработкой из себе подобных вам не привыкать".

traits.locale_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar'. From what I have heard of your living conditions, consuming processed remains of your own kind is hardly a novelty for you."

"I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar'. From what I have heard of your living conditions, consuming processed remains of your own kind is hardly a novelty for you."

"I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

"I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

"I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

languages.text: «{name}, confío en que no dejes pasar la oportunidad de degustar este "néctar". Por lo que he oído de las condiciones de vida de tu gente, consumir los restos procesados de tu propio pueblo no es nada nuevo».
languages.original_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

traits.locale_text: «{name}, confío en que no dejes pasar la oportunidad de degustar este "néctar". Por lo que he oído de las condiciones de vida de tu gente, consumir los restos procesados de tu propio pueblo no es nada nuevo».

languages.text: “{name}，你不会拒绝享用这番‘琼浆玉露’的机会吧？就凭我所听闻的你们族群的生存环境，吞食加工后的同类遗骸，对你而言，恐怕也算不得什么新鲜事。”
languages.original_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

traits.locale_text: “{name}，你不会拒绝享用这番‘琼浆玉露’的机会吧？就凭我所听闻的你们族群的生存环境，吞食加工后的同类遗骸，对你而言，恐怕也算不得什么新鲜事。”

languages.text: « J'imagine que vous n'allez pas manquer cette occasion de savourer ce "nectar", {name}. D'après ce que je sais de votre peuple, consommer une décoction à base des restes de vos congénères n'a rien d’inhabituel pour vous. »
languages.original_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

traits.locale_text: « J'imagine que vous n'allez pas manquer cette occasion de savourer ce "nectar", {name}. D'après ce que je sais de votre peuple, consommer une décoction à base des restes de vos congénères n'a rien d’inhabituel pour vous. »

languages.text: "Eminim ki bu 'nektarın' tadına bakma fırsatını geri çevirmezsin. Halkının yaşam koşullarıyla ilgili duyduklarıma bakılırsa... Kendi türünün işlenmiş kalıntılarını tüketmek senin için yeni bir şey olmasa gerek."
languages.original_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

traits.locale_text: "Eminim ki bu 'nektarın' tadına bakma fırsatını geri çevirmezsin. Halkının yaşam koşullarıyla ilgili duyduklarıma bakılırsa... Kendi türünün işlenmiş kalıntılarını tüketmek senin için yeni bir şey olmasa gerek."

languages.text: "Ich nehme an, {name}, Ihr lasst Euch die Gelegenheit nicht entgehen, diesen 'Nektar' zu kosten. Nach allem, was ich über die Lebensbedingungen Eurer Art gehört habe, sollte der Verzehr der verarbeiteten Überreste Eurer eigener Leute für Euch nichts Neues sein."
languages.original_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich nehme an, {name}, Ihr lasst Euch die Gelegenheit nicht entgehen, diesen 'Nektar' zu kosten. Nach allem, was ich über die Lebensbedingungen Eurer Art gehört habe, sollte der Verzehr der verarbeiteten Überreste Eurer eigener Leute für Euch nichts Neues sein."

languages.text: 「{名前}、この『ネクター』を味わう機会を自らに与えないでほしい。あなたの民族の生活状況を聞いたところによると、自分の仲間の加工された遺体を食べることは、あなたにとって珍しいことではないはずだ。」
languages.original_text: "I trust, {name}, you will not deny yourself the opportunity to savour this 'nectar.' From what I have heard of your people's living conditions, consuming the processed remains of your own kind should hardly be a novelty for you."

traits.locale_text: 「{名前}、この『ネクター』を味わう機会を自らに与えないでほしい。あなたの民族の生活状況を聞いたところによると、自分の仲間の加工された遺体を食べることは、あなたにとって珍しいことではないはずだ。」
